heroSection.title: Hero Section
heroSection.description: Manage your landing page hero section content, media, and statistics
heroSection.generalInfoDesc: Update the hero section title, description, and call-to-action button
heroSection.mediaManagementDesc: Upload and manage videos or images for the hero background
heroSection.createHeroDesc: Set up your landing page hero section
heroSection.noHeroSectionDesc: Please create a hero section to get started
heroSection.autoPlayIntervalHelp: Time in milliseconds between automatic image switches (1000-30000ms). Videos will play until completion.
heroSection.buttonLinkHelp: Leave empty to disable button link
heroSection.statisticsManagementDesc: Manage the four statistics cards displayed at the bottom of the hero section
heroSection.addFirstStatistic: Add your first statistic card above
heroSection.statDescriptionPlaceholderEn: e.g., A wide range project needs
heroSection.statDescriptionPlaceholderAr: مثال: مجموعة واسعة من احتياجات المشروع
heroSection.uploadFirstMedia: Upload your first video or image above
